headline: How Q1 Results And AI Uncertainty Are Reframing The Adobe (ADBE) Investment Narrative
summary: Adobe's updated model fair value has shifted from US$328.19 to US$331.63 per share, a measured recalibration rather than a sweeping reset. This kind of fine tuning reflects the mixed Wall Street backdrop, where some firms are trimming price targets or moving to Hold, while others highlight Q1 upside and resilience in core metrics as they rethink how much they are willing to pay for the stock. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the evolving Adobe narrative and what to...
